name: MailDump

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
MailDump 0.0.6

Changes:
- Rebuilt the panel as a compact Obsidian-style side pane.
- Added a resizable preset list with a native resize handle.
- Restored a persistent current-process block at the bottom of the panel.
- Kept the Obsidian status bar integration.
- Fixed active preset outline clipping inside the scrollable preset list.

Validation:
- node --check main.js
- JSON parse for manifest.json and versions.json
- mojibake scan
releases.name: MailDump 0.0.6

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
# MailDump 0.0.1

First public architecture baseline for MailDump.

MailDump is a desktop-only Obsidian plugin for exporting IMAP mail into analysis-ready Markdown digests.

## Included

- IMAP mail export into Markdown digest
- Russian plugin interface
- English Obsidian commands
- Presets stored in Obsidian plugin data
- Preset import and export
- App-password handling modes
- Reply-chain cleanup
- Custom reply-chain marker
- Subject-based thread index
- Potentially unanswered incoming messages
- Optional message notes
- Optional adjacent attachment export

## Requirements

- Obsidian 1.5.0 or newer
- Desktop only
- IMAP account access
- App-password is recommended

## Release assets

This release must include:

- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: MailDump 0.0.1
